## Data Sources & Dependencies
Review what this search consumes and confirm every dependency exists in this environment.

- Indexes, data models, macros and lookups are auto-extracted from the SPL in the table above
- Flag anything that is missing or pointing at the wrong source
Which data dependency types does this search rely on?
description: Tick every dependency type shown in the table above. Saved as a comma-separated list.

question: Are all referenced indexes valid and populated with current data?
description: Confirm each index in the table above exists and is receiving events.

question: How many distinct indexes does this search read from?
description: Enter the count of indexes shown above (0 if it uses only a data model or a generating command).

question: Are all macros and lookups present in this environment?
description: A missing macro or lookup will cause the search to error at runtime.
